mnemonics.title: FIFO vs LRU
mnemonics.content: FIFO: First In First Out (queue). LRU: Least Recently Used (track usage timestamps)

mnemonics.title: Page Table Bits
mnemonics.content: PRAWD: Present, Referenced, Accessed, Write-enabled, Dirty

acronyms.usage: Hardware cache for page table entries

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a multi-level tree structure where each level narrows down page location
Picture memory divided into variable-sized blocks like book chapters

analogies.analogy: Like a library - you only keep frequently used books (pages) on shelves (RAM), others in storage (disk)
Similar to a restaurant's frequent customer list - quick access to regulars
